title: How to create formula for initials with numbers
excerpt: Screenshot is attached. I need the first column with the names for example Thiele, Greg. To be read GTHIELE and the appointment id after that all connected. In the end itll look like this for example on row one. GTHIELE9…

posts.author: Mrjoelbaker (Joel baker)
posts.cookedHtml:
Screenshot is attached. I need the first column with the names for example Thiele, Greg. To be read GTHIELE and the appointment id after that all connected. In the end itll look like this for example on row one. GTHIELE945275144

Screenshot_20230104_202514_Outlook1079×487 79.4 KB

posts.author: Mrjoelbaker (Joel baker)
posts.cookedHtml: Got it figured out! It was LEFT(RIGHT({Name},MINUS(LEN({Name}),SEARCH(" “,{Name},1))),1) & regexextract({Name},”[\w]*") & {APPOINTMENT ID}
